title: Employment Support for Persons with Disabilities
text:
Employment Support for Persons with Disabilities - SupportGoWhere
Employment Support for Persons with Disabilities
Share link
Enhances the employability of, and increases employment options for, Persons with Disabilities (PWDs) by providing access to career advisory services, training courses, and post-placement job support. Administered by SG Enable.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Career advisory services to help establish job readiness, and identify training and career options
Course fee subsidies of up to 95% for SG Enable’s list of curated training courses
Received training allowance of $6 per hour, and training commitment award of $100 per completed course
Collapse all sections
About this support

Career advisory services to help determine job readiness and explore career pathways

Up to 95% subsidy on course fees for SG Enable’s list of curated training courses

Training allowance at $6 per hour for course duration

Training commitment award of $100 for each completed course

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident

Identified as Person(s) with Disabilities (PWDs), specifically, individual(s) with physical, sensory, intellectual and/or development impairments, which substantially reduce their prospects of securing and retaining jobs, and advancing in education, training and employment, and recreation

Certification from medical doctor required to prove disability status

How to apply?

Contact SG Enable at 1800-8585-885 or employment@sgenable.sg for more information.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SG Enable hotline: 1800-8585-885

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

20 Lengkok Bahru (Enabling Village)

#01-01 Singapore 159053

Scheme last updated 29 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
